name: Make-Ahead Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and coarsely chop the cucumber.
2. Seed and dice the green pepper.
3. Peel, core, and coarsely chop the tomatoes.
4. Thinly slice the green onions (including their tops).
5. In a 3-quart pan over medium heat, combine the vegetable stock, tomato juice, lemon juice, green taco sauce, sugar, garlic salt, and pepper.
6. Leave the pan uncovered and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Stir in the chopped cucumber, green pepper, tomatoes, and sliced onions.
8. Return to a boil and then remove from heat.
9. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
10. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
11. Serve 1 cup per serving.
12. Per serving: 3 grams protein, 14 grams carbohydrates, no cholesterol, 64 calories.
13. This is an easy make-ahead soup to start a meal with.
